name: import-export-workflow
scenario: Import an existing .env file into EVM, verify the import was successful, then export it in three different formats: JSON, shell script, and back to .env. Show how to import a nested JSON file with environment groups.
success_criteria: Creates or uses an existing .env file for import
Uses load command with correct format detection
Demonstrates nested JSON import with environment groups
anti_patterns: Not verifying import success before exporting
Forgetting --format flag when format can't be auto-detected
Not using --output to specify export destination
Not checking file permissions on exported files
